rules: Always read CLAUDE.md before starting any task
Never add business logic to controller or repository classes
Never return JPA entities from controller methods — use DTOs
Always use constructor injection, never @Autowired field injection
Every new environment variable must be added to .env.example immediately
Never hardcode credentials, URLs, or secrets in any tracked file
Method naming in tests must follow: methodUnderTest_scenario
Stock status is computed in the service layer — never stored in the database
Circular dependencies between packages are forbidden
Mixed import styles are forbidden — no wildcard + specific mix
